message:
ci: Use bunx instead of npx for Playwright install

🔮 View transcript: https://agentlogs.ai/s/0da6cac6-929f-451c-8d82-a705a4315299

files.patch:
@@ -35,7 +35,7 @@ jobs:
         run: bun test
 
       - name: Install Playwright browsers
-        run: npx playwright install --with-deps chromium
+        run: bunx playwright install --with-deps chromium
 
       - name: Run E2E tests
         run: bun run test:e2e
